unit_tests.reason: Requires PERSISTENCE_MODE=postgres (PostgreSQL not available on this workstation)
unit_tests.detail: Unit tests in tests/unit/ (auth-and-validation, authorization) are pure logic and would pass with Node.js, but the test runner requires postgres for all suites

api_tests.reason: Requires PostgreSQL running with full schema and seed data

integration_tests.reason: Requires PostgreSQL running with full schema and seed data

smoke_tests.reason: Requires PostgreSQL running with full schema and seed data

coverage.reason: Requires PostgreSQL running with full schema and seed data

recommendation: Install PostgreSQL 16+, create database, run migrations 001-017 and seeds 1-5, then run full backend regression
